title: rubus cosmophyllus
intro: Rubus cosmophyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus cosmophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Rubus cosmophyllus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
